instructions.instruction: This is the instructional prayer. You will be guided through all motions. The reciter will give you an instruction to move into a prayer position. When you are in the position, the recitation of the prayer will begin.
Stand for the second rak'ah
Bow forward, hands on knees
Rise to standing
Prostrate, forehead to ground
Sit upright
Prostrate again
Sit for the short Tashahhud
Stand for the fourth rak'ah
Stand for the third rak'ah
Sit for Tashahhud
Turn your head to the right
Turn your head to the left
Please stand
Please bow into Ruku
Please return to standing
Please lower into Sujood
Please sit up
Please lower into Sujood again
Please sit
Please sit for Tashahhud
Please turn right
Please turn left
Stand upright and put your hands by your side.
Give your niyet for {prayer}
Calibration starting. You have fifteen positions to complete. Stand upright — this is Qiyam.
Ruku. Bow forward and place both hands on your knees.
Qiyam. Return to standing upright.
Sujood. Lower into prostration with your forehead touching the ground.
Julus. Sit upright on your knees.
Sujood. Lower into prostration again with your forehead touching the ground.
Qiyam. Stand upright for the second rakat.
Julus. Sit upright for Tashahhud.
Tasleem. Turn your head to the right.
Tasleem. Turn your head to the left.
Get ready to bow into Ruku.
Get ready to stand upright into Qiyam.
Get ready to lower into Sujood.
Get ready to sit upright into Julus.
Get ready to lower into Sujood again.
Get ready to stand upright for the second rakat.
Get ready to sit for Tashahhud.
Get ready to turn your head to the right for Tasleem.
Get ready to turn your head to the left.
Calibration complete. You may move freely.
Bow forward and place both hands on your knees.
Stand upright.
Lower into prostration with your forehead touching the ground.
Sit upright on your knees.
Turn your head to the right.
Turn your head to the left.
Hold this position for five seconds.
